ogTitle: Karrinyup vs Karroun Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karrinyup and Karroun Hill.
heading: Karrinyup vs Karroun Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karrinyup, Western Australia and Karroun Hill, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Karrinyup has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Karroun Hill (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karrinyup or Karroun Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karrinyup has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Karroun Hill scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karrinyup scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Karroun Hill scores 33/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karrinyup or Karroun Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Karrinyup has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
